runs.taskSummary: Review the current working tree diff in /workspaces/pi-sense-agent. This is a significant implementation covering: 1) Full rewrite of server.ts with API routes, WebSocket, MQTT→InfluxDB pipeline, file watcher 2) Validation scripts (scripts/validate-sensor.ts, scripts/screenshot-sensor.ts) 3) DASHBOARD_OWNER.md skill file with frontmatter 4) .pi/settings.json for skill loading 5) Test sensor in sensors/test/ 6) pipeline.json. Focus on: correctness, regressions, security risks, and validation gaps. Run `git diff` and `git diff --cached` to see the changes. Also check the server.ts for the Bun.serve websocket pattern and the API route handling.
